ticketsPageTitle: Purchase Tickets | Madison Chinese Dance Academy
ticketsMetaDescription: Purchase tickets for Madison Chinese Dance Academy performances.
ticketsSupportText: Ticket information for upcoming performances will be posted here.
ticketsDetailsText: Join us for Splendid China 2026 — an evening of traditional and contemporary Chinese dance presented by community performers. Tickets support production costs, venue rental, and scholarships for student participants.
ticketsDetailsFollowup: Seats are limited. Please purchase tickets in advance through our secure ticketing partner. If you have accessibility needs or questions about group sales, email us at ahuan98-dance@yahoo.com.
ticketsFormNote: Use the secure embedded ticketing form below.
